hero.title: Fathul is a Malaysia-based developer exploring how software and intelligent systems shape the way we interact and create.
hero.subtitle: His work blends form, function, and automation — always built on engineering and curiosity.

about.title: About me
about.subtitle: Fathul Fahmy
about.description_1: I care about building digital experiences and intelligent systems that people actually want to use. Whether it's websites, ERP, CRM, or API,
about.description_2: my approach is guided by curiosity, simplicity, and a constant search for better ways to solve problems through technology.
